name: intermediate_view_1
SQL: CREATE VIEW intermediate_view_1 AS SELECT detailed_player_data.player, detailed_player_data.fantasy_points, detailed_player_data.match_outcome, batter_player_stats.total_runs, bowler_player_stats.total_wickets_taken FROM detailed_player_data JOIN batter_player_stats ON detailed_player_data.player = batter_player_stats.player_name JOIN bowler_player_stats ON detailed_player_data.player = bowler_player_stats.player_name;

name: intermediate_view_2
SQL: CREATE VIEW intermediate_view_2 AS SELECT detailed_player_data.match_id, detailed_player_data.runs, detailed_player_data.wickets, detailed_player_data.match_outcome FROM detailed_player_data;

name: intermediate_view_3
SQL: CREATE VIEW intermediate_view_3 AS SELECT match_summary.match_id, match_summary.outcome_winner, match_summary.player_of_match, match_summary.total_fours, match_summary.total_sixes FROM match_summary;
